title: Immersive Winds
description: Overhauls weather in your Minecraft world for a windy quality of life improvement!
body: ![Environment client](https://img.shields.io/badge/client-1976d2?style=for-the-badge) ![Environment server](https://img.shields.io/badge/server-1976d2?style=for-the-badge) [![Report Issues](https://img.shields.io/badge/Report_Issues-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&color=FFFFFF)](https://discord.com/channels/1456078368339529728/1456080361388904508) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=000000&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-winds) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=CurseForge&color=F16436&labelColor=F16436&style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-winds) [![Sinytra](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Sinytra&color=fbfbfa&labelColor=78563c&style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,PASTE_BASE64_HERE)](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) **NEOFORGE REQUIRES SINYTRA TO RUN, ALL MOD FILES ARE FABRIC** **MOD MENU REQUIRES CLOTH CONFIG API TO RUN**
